
--- page 1 ---


Example Protocol Informal Review
Auditor: Anonymous

Executive Summary

This informal review was not performed under a standard engagement
template, so there is no explicit scope section. The reviewer looked at
a mix of contracts as time allowed.

--- page 2 ---


Observations

There are several subtle issues with how storage slots are laid out, but
a thorough review would require a separate engagement. No particular
file or contract is called out for inclusion or exclusion.

--- page 3 ---


Conclusion

Further audit work recommended.
